mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.agent_company_id, e.name, e.phone, e.skills, e.certifications, e.status, e.quality_score, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name FROM agent_engineer e LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = e.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0
e.deleted = 0
AND (e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR e.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND e.agent_company_id = #{query.agentCompanyId}
AND e.status = #{query.status}
AND JSON_CONTAINS(e.skills, JSON_QUOTE(#{query.skill}))
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.id, e.agent_company_id, e.name, e.phone, e.skills, e.certifications, e.status, e.quality_score, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name FROM agent_engineer e LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = e.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.deleted = 0

SELECT e.id, e.agent_company_id, e.name, e.phone, e.skills, e.certifications, e.status, e.quality_score, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name FROM agent_engineer e LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = e.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 WHERE e.agent_company_id = #{companyId} AND e.deleted = 0 ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT t.id, t.project_id, t.task_id, t.agent_company_id, t.agent_engineer_id, t.task_scope, t.deadline, t.status, t.submit_count, t.confirmed_by, t.confirmed_time, t.reject_reason, t.version, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, p.project_name, p.project_code, pt.task_name, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name, ae.name AS agent_engineer_name FROM outsource_task t LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_task pt ON pt.id = t.task_id AND pt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = t.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_engineer ae ON ae.id = t.agent_engineer_id AND ae.deleted = 0 WHERE t.agent_engineer_id = #{engineerId} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
